title: How to Verify AI Agent Work Before You Trust It
titleCandidates: How to Verify AI Agent Work Before You Trust It
Did Your AI Agent Really Finish? Verify the Outcome
Build AI Agent Evals That Catch Real Failures
description:
AI Agent evaluation should verify the result—not trust a polished completion message. This video gives you a practical acceptance method for checking final state, choosing the right graders, and measuring whether success repeats.

What you'll learn:
- Define tasks and success criteria that two reviewers can grade consistently
- Verify outcomes with deterministic, model-based, and human graders
- Run repeated trials and audit whether the evaluation itself is fair

Chapters:
00:00 Introduction
01:13 Define Success
02:55 Grade the Outcome
04:43 Test Reliability
06:23 Audit the Eval
08:07 Acceptance Sheet
09:42 Summary

Follow Tiny Agent. Tiny Agent helps you get better at using AI.
